tables.table_title: Comparison of CIR, SHAP, and LIME on XGBoost, Random Forest, and SVM models.
tables.table_note: CIR outperforms SHAP and LIME in terms of accuracy and interpretability.

tables.table_title: Comparison of MeshGraphNet and Shared MeshGraphNet on cross-subject knee contact stress prediction.
tables.table_note: Shared MeshGraphNet achieves state-of-the-art performance in cross-subject knee contact stress prediction.
